metadata.title: FULI Machinery - Professional Bearing Manufacturer
metadata.description: FULI Machinery (Shandong) Limited Company - Manufacturer of Deep Groove Ball Bearings, Tapered Roller Bearings, Spherical Roller Bearings, and Pillow Block Bearings.

hero.title: Precision Bearings for Industry
hero.subtitle: Deep Groove Ball · Tapered Roller · Spherical Roller · Pillow Block
hero.description: FULI Machinery manufactures high-quality bearings trusted by clients worldwide. ISO certified, competitive pricing, fast delivery.

categories.title: Our Products
categories.subtitle: Comprehensive bearing solutions for every application

deepGroove.title: Deep Groove Ball Bearings
deepGroove.description: Versatile single-row bearings for high speeds and moderate loads. Standard and non-standard sizes available.

taperedRoller.title: Tapered Roller Bearings
taperedRoller.description: Handle combined radial and axial loads with high precision. Metric and inch series.

sphericalRoller.title: Spherical Roller Bearings
sphericalRoller.description: Self-aligning design compensates for shaft deflection. Ideal for heavy radial loads.

pillowBlock.title: Pillow Block Bearings
pillowBlock.description: Mounted bearing units with housing for easy installation. UCP, UCF, UCT, UCFC series.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: ISO 9001 certified manufacturing with strict quality control at every stage.

price.title: Competitive Pricing
price.description: Factory-direct prices without middlemen. Volume discounts available.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.description: Large inventory ready for immediate shipment. Custom orders in 15-30 days.

custom.title: Custom Solutions
custom.description: OEM/ODM accepted. Special sizes, materials, and packaging upon request.

applications.title: Applications
applications.subtitle: Our bearings serve diverse industries worldwide

cta.description: Send us your requirements and get a competitive quote within 24 hours.

about.title: About FULI Machinery
about.intro: FULI Machinery (Shandong) Limited Company is a professional bearing manufacturer with complete production lines and a strong R&D team.
about.description: We accept customers' special requirements for bearing structure and quality, and produce corresponding bearing products according to various customers' diversified demands. FULI brand focus on high-end products. With its stable quality, our bearings are sold well all over the world and are widely used in many applications, such as food machinery, agricultural machinery, mining machinery, automobiles, motorcycles and electric vehicles.
about.missionText: To provide world-class bearing solutions that enable our customers' success through quality, innovation, and reliable service.
about.visionText: To become a globally recognized bearing brand known for precision, durability, and customer satisfaction.
